abilities.name: Hands Off (Mask)
abilities.description: After damaged by y attack, may immediately move yards equal to Walk in any direction.

abilities.name: Flick of the Wrist
abilities.description: Use Grace instead of Might for Melee and Pugilism attacks.

abilities.name: Illegible Prescriptions
abilities.description: During duel, may end Focused Condition to add any suit to final duel total.

actions: (1) Surgical Instruments (Melee) | AV: 5 (11) | Rg: y1 | Resist: Df | Target suffers 2/3/5 damage, ignoring Hard to Wound.
(1) Syringe (Melee) | AV: 5 (11) | Rg: y1 | Resist: Df | Target suffers 0/0/1 damage and gains Poison +4. Ram Overdose: Target suffers 2/3/4 and no Poison.
(1) Take Your Meds (Doctor) | AV: 5 (11) | Rg: 8 | Resist: Wp | Target gains Condition until start of next turn: Ram Hallucinogens, Mask Uppers, Tome Downers, or Crow Painkillers.
system.notes: McMourning promised nurses eternal youth through skin transplant. Psychological trauma drives insanity. Experts in anesthetics. Serve in Guild morgue and Quarantine Zone lab.
